title: Maashan
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Character
|type=Rebel

|name=Maashan
|homeworld=[[Kamar/Legends|Kamar]]<ref name="Homeworld">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'' states that Maashan's [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] is the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Varn]]. However, [[Kamarian Badlander]]s are native to the planet [[Kamar/Legends|Kamar]] as established in ''[[Han Solo's Revenge]]''. Maashan's biography also states that he left his homeworld years before the "[[Cult of Varn]]" took hold on the planet, an event that occurred on Kamar and was recounted in ''Han Solo's Revenge''. This means that Maashan must have been born on Kamar, and Varn being listed as his homeworld is an error.</ref>

'''Maashan''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Kamarian Badlander]] and a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] member.

==Biography==
Maashan was born<ref name="AIR" /> on [[Kamar/Legends|Kamar]],<ref name="Homeworld" /> but left the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] before [[10 BBY/Legends|10 BBY]], and thus was not affected by the rise of the [[Cult of Varn]] on the planet.<ref name="AIR" />

A pyrotechnician, Maashan joined the [[Galactic Outdoor Survival School/Legends|Galactic Outdoor Survival School]] and became a member of the prestigious [[Twilight Class]], which graduated around 10 BBY. Afterward, Maashan and most of his classmates joined the Rebel Alliance.<ref name="AIR" />

Maashan was [[Death/Legends|killed]] during an alien attack on the Rebel safeworld [[Stronghold (planet)|Stronghold]].<ref name="AIR" />
